remarks: 2 Potential lots. Approved subdivision. .57 acre total located in a prime area, close to highways and shopping. R-10 zoning. Municipal sewage and water. Build two 2.5 story properties with an ADU? Shovel Ready!!! Walking distance to places of worship!
